headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 28, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann leading the offense and Parker Messick pitching 5.2 strong innings. The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Pittsburgh Pirates 4-2, led by JJ Wetherholt's home run and Ryan Fernandez's 2.0 scoreless innings. The Boston Red Sox dominated the Toronto Blue Jays 5-0, with Ranger Suarez pitching 8.0 innings and 10 strikeouts.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. Max Muncy, the Athletics' third baseman, has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left fifth metacarpal fracture. The New York Yankees have also placed Giancarlo Stanton on the 10-day injured list with a right calf strain. Other teams have suffered injuries to Kodai Senga, Tanner Murray, Max Scherzer, Logan O'Hoppe, Riley Martin, and Connor Seabold.

Several trades and roster movements have taken place. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired catcher Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash. The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Guardians in Thrilling 3-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays took down the Cleveland Guardians 3-2, securing a narrow win. Daniel Schneemann led the Rays' offense with a home run and two RBIs, while Parker Messick pitched 5.2 strong innings with nine strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Pirates 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 4-2 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with JJ Wetherholt leading the offense with a home run and one RBI. Ryan Fernandez earned the win with 2.0 scoreless innings, striking out 4 batters.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Shut Out Blue Jays 5-0**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Toronto Blue Jays, securing a 5-0 victory. Ranger Suarez led the way on the mound, pitching 8.0 innings with 10 strikeouts and no earned runs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Fall to Twins in 11-4 Rout**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners suffered a tough loss to the Minnesota Twins, who dominated with an 11-4 final score. Kody Clemens led the Twins' offense with a standout performance, hitting 2 home runs and driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Place Max Muncy on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Max Muncy, the Athletics' third baseman, has been placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 26, 2026, due to a left fifth metacarpal fracture.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Willie MacIver in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have added catcher Willie MacIver to their roster, acquired in a trade with the Texas Rangers for cash.
